title: PolicyDecision
description: The immutable, hash-signed audit record of a single /v2/decisions/evaluate call. Outcome is permit, deny, or permitWithObligations.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

decision.description: The evaluation outcome: permit, deny, or permitWithObligations.

policyId.description: URN of the Policy that produced this decision. Pattern: urn:srcos:policy:<id>

inputs.description: The exact subject, object, purpose, and environment inputs that were evaluated.

obligations.description: Obligations attached to a permitWithObligations decision.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this decision was issued.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time after which this decision is no longer valid.

decisionHash.description: sha256: prefixed hash of the canonical inputs+outcome for tamper-evidence.
